description: Walk all leaf pages in a B-tree from a known root page
steps: Construct a synthetic ESE database with a 2-level B-tree (one root, two leaves)
Call EseDatabase::walk_leaf_pages(root_page) returning an iterator or Vec of page numbers
Verify both leaf page numbers are returned
Verify the root page number itself is not included

description: Single-page B-tree (root is also a leaf) returns that page
steps: Construct a synthetic ESE database where the root page has the leaf flag set
Verify the root page number is returned as the single result
